EMAIL 1 - Friendly Introduction

Subject: New HomeSafe user here!

Hi HomeSafe team,

Just wanted to introduce myself - I'm Kevin and I recently set up my HomeSafe account. I've been looking for a good home safety assessment app and HomeSafe came highly recommended.

I'm planning to submit a heating safety assessment in the next few days. I'm pretty careful about home safety stuff, but I figured it's always good to get expert guidance, especially with heating equipment.

Looking forward to using the app!

Cheers,
Kevin

---

EMAIL 2 - Casual Follow-up

Subject: Getting ready to submit my first assessment

Hey HomeSafe,

Hope you're having a good week! I've been getting familiar with the app features and I'm impressed with how thorough the safety evaluations are.

I'll be sending in my home heating setup for assessment soon. No rush on the review - just whenever you get to it is fine. I want to make sure I'm doing things safely, so I appreciate having this resource available.

Thanks for providing this service!

Best,
Kevin
